perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Last night a Russian drone entered Romanian airspace and hit a residential building, injuring civilians. Time and again, Russia has shown it has no regard for civilian life, international law, or sovereignty of its neighbours. We stand with Ukraine, Romania and all NATO allies.

stories.headline: Shams reports Magic hiring Sean Sweeney as new head coach
stories.body: BREAKING: The Orlando Magic are finalizing the hire of San Antonio Spurs associate coach Sean Sweeney as the franchise's new head coach, sources tell ESPN. Sweeney broke into NBA coaching in 2011 and now lands the Magic head job as a top rising candidate.

stories.headline: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson underwent surgery on broken pinky but plans to play in NBA Finals Game 1
stories.body: Mitchell Robinson has undergone surgery on his broken right pinky finger -- and fully plans to play in the New York Knicks' Game 1 of the NBA Finals against OKC or San Antonio next Wednesday while wearing a brace on his hand, sources tell ESPN.

stories.headline: Video clip of Elon Musk commenting on government and AI/robots solving national debt.
stories.body:
BREAKING:

Elon Musk just said what nobody in Washington wants to hear.

"The government is basically unfixable."
"If AI and robots don't solve our national debt. We're toast."

$39,000,000,000,000 in national debt.
Adding trillions every year.

The man who built Tesla. SpaceX. 
And tried to fix the government himself.

Just admitted it can't be fixed by humans.

Only two things can save America now.
AI and robots. Or bankruptcy.

There is no third option.

stories.headline: Lex Fridman shares new podcast episode on physics with Don Lincoln
stories.body:
Here's my conversation with Don Lincoln about some of the biggest open questions in physics, including dark energy, dark matter, the matter-antimatter imbalance, quantum vacuum, quantum foam, and the quest to unify the laws of physics.

Don is a particle physicist at Fermilab who has spent decades working at the frontiers of high energy physics. He is also a great teacher & writer. I highly recommend his courses & books. One of my favorite lecture series he has given is The Evidence for Modern Physics where he breaks down the experiments that validate some of the weird laws of physics we have, and what it would take to validate even the weirder ones.

It's not enough to come up with a beautiful theory. You also have to show through experiment that the theory is likely to be correct. This process often doesn't get the love it deserves, even though it's often the most important and difficult part of the scientific process.

I ❤️ physics.

The conversation is here on X in full and is up everywhere else (see comment).

Timestamps:
0:00 - Introduction
0:49 - Unifying the laws of nature
15:20 - General relativity
32:27 - Electroweak force
44:09 - How particle colliders work
1:02:12 - Higgs boson discovery
1:12:32 - Theory of everything
1:42:17 - Physics of empty space
1:49:41 - Antimatter
2:10:31 - Dark energy
2:14:20 - Dark matter
2:42:56 - Future of physics

stories.headline: SoCal resident shares beach photo and positive message
stories.body: Good Morning and Happy Friday Everyone from the Islands in SoCal 😊❤️🔥🇺🇸🦅🌺🏖️🌇 I was looking through my photos and I found this 👇🏾 I took this one years ago 💯 It’s amazing 💯🙌🏾 I love this 1 🫶🏾 It is Beautiful view of the beach in my hometown 💯🙌🏾 As a girl here from Cali that lives by the Islands I absolutely love the Sea 🌊☺️❤️🔥🇺🇸🦅🐟🦀🐬🦞🐠🦐🐋🦭🐳😊❤️🏝️ I’m gonna listen to Oldies music 😎❤️🔥🔈🎶 Reading your tweets on X 💯🔥 All of you good ppl especially this dude and his twin 👇🏾 make me happy smile laugh make me want to get on up and dance and give me positive thoughts vibes & energy 💃🏽😊❤️🔥🤛🏾💥🇺🇸🦅 Today is gonna be awesome 💯🙌🏾 It’s goin to be a Good Friday with all of you Beautiful Amazing great American Patriots 😉😊❤️🔥✊🏾💥🇺🇸🦅😏🔥🤜🏾💥🇺🇸🦅😌🔥🥊💥🇺🇸🦅🔥👊🏾💥🇺🇸🦅😉❤️😎🔥☠️🙌🏾💯

stories.headline: Spencer Pratt dodges 9/11 conspiracy question from Jake Tapper
stories.body:
Spencer Pratt evades Jake Tapper’s attempt to trap him with a 9/11 conspiracy question—something that would be politically toxic in Los Angeles—and Pratt turns it around to highlight the corruption and gross incompetence of city leadership.

10/10.
